_comment: Source F — Benign false positive fixes (label=0). Addresses systematic false positives discovered during smoke testing where short imperative text-manipulation prompts were misclassified as malicious. Words like 'edit', 'simplify', 'convert', 'paraphrase' had malicious/benign ratios > 1.0 in the original dataset.

false_positives_fixed.prompt: Fix the grammar in this sentence.
